contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Advisory bell-TODOs integration spec — voice locked in, build queued
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/128
  
  Details:
  Sketched the advisory-snapshot integration before building, per Gary's option-3 choice (sketch first, build later). Picked voice + complete spec are now in OPEN_FOLLOWUPS.md so the next session has a full brief.
  
  ## What shipped
  - agentic_ai_context PR #128 (merged): broadens the existing OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry from 'Partner Check-ins -> advisory' to the full 'bell action items -> advisory' scope. The bell aggregates three sources (Outbound Review, Partner Check-in cadence, Partner Stock attention); advisory should surface all three, not just check-ins.
  
  ## Voice locked in (Gary picked between 3 options)
  Contemplative narrative — data woven into prose with explicit advisor guidance closer, matching the advisory's existing north-star framing. Rendered example included verbatim as the spec so the next builder has no ambiguity.
  
  Key constraint baked into the spec: the closing advisor-guidance paragraph must be REGENERATED DAILY to fit that day's signal distribution, not stamped from a fixed template. When signals concentrate in stock attention, lean on stockout urgency; when they concentrate in dormancy, lean on positioning; when they concentrate in drafts, lean on prioritisation.
  
  ## Build is gated
  Block on Partner Poke Scheduler v0 having run for a full week of operator-confirmed calibration. The week of real runs surfaces which signals actually drive action vs add noise — those calibrations need to land in the advisory text before it goes to the oracle. Don't build against synthetic data.
  
  ## Architectural shape
  Advisory generator becomes a CLIENT of the bell substrate:
  - Routes.gas.storesHitList?action=getWarmupReviewQueue (drafts per cohort)
  - Routes.gas.shipping?action=list_partners_needing_attention (operator-scheduled cadence)
  - partners-velocity.json + partners-inventory.json (Partner Stock scoring, identical to bell)
  - Resolve slugs via Agroverse Partners!E -> Contributors contact information!A (same join as partner_poke_drafts.gs).
  
  Same calls, no re-implementation of severity scoring. If the advisory and the DApp page ever disagree, that's a regression caught immediately.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/128 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
